title: CHILDCARE & MORE - 211info
text: YMCA CAMP COLLINS CHILDCARE & MORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of preschool, afterschool, and enrichment classes such as art and dance at locations throughout the community. 3001 SE Oxbow Parkway Gresham, OR 97080 Eligibility: Ages 0-18; most activities for ages 0-12 Hours: Varies by service Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Fall, Winter, and Spring Office Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Summer Office Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-noon, Sunday noon-6pm Services: Y Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YMCA CAMP COLLINS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
